description: Erasing the generated output tree entirely and rebuilding from `ggen sync run` produces output byte-identical to a plain incremental resync over existing output. Proven twice, both pre- and post-frontmatter-fix.
commands: ggen sync run --format json          # incremental baseline (over existing output)
rm -rf consumer                      # erase generated output tree entirely
ggen sync run --format json          # clean rebuild
find <14 canonical output paths> | sort | xargs shasum -a 256 | shasum -a 256   # compare inventory digests
falsifier_checked: clean rebuild differs from incremental output
note: Same scope caveat as cap03: this proves pipeline fixed-point convergence, not generated-code correctness.
